tEn: Image-to-Image Translation with Conditional Adversarial Networks
tZh: 基于条件对抗网络的图像到图像翻译
sEn: Conditional adversarial networks serve as a general-purpose solution for image-to-image translation, learning both the mapping and the loss function.
sZh: 条件对抗网络作为图像到图像翻译的通用解决方案，同时学习映射和损失函数。
absEn: We investigate conditional adversarial networks as a general-purpose solution to image-to-image translation problems. These networks not only learn the mapping from input image to output image, but also learn a loss function to train this mapping. This makes it possible to apply the same generic approach to problems that traditionally would require very different loss formulations. We demonstrate that this approach is effective at synthesizing photos from label maps, reconstructing objects from edge maps, and colorizing images, among other tasks. Indeed, since the release of the pix2pix software associated with this paper, a large number of internet users (many of them artists) have posted their own experiments with our system, further demonstrating its wide applicability and ease of adoption without the need for parameter tweaking. As a community, we no longer hand-engineer our mapping functions, and this work suggests we can achieve reasonable results without hand-engineering our loss functions either.
absZh: 我们研究了条件对抗网络作为图像到图像翻译问题的通用解决方案。这些网络不仅学习从输入图像到输出图像的映射，还学习训练该映射的损失函数。这使得可以将相同的通用方法应用于传统上需要非常不同损失公式的问题。我们证明了该方法在从标签图合成照片、从边缘图重建物体以及图像着色等任务中是有效的。事实上，自与本文相关的pix2pix软件发布以来，大量互联网用户（其中许多是艺术家）发布了他们使用我们系统的实验，进一步证明了其广泛的适用性和无需参数调整的易用性。作为一个社区，我们不再手工设计映射函数，而这项工作表明，我们也可以在不手工设计损失函数的情况下获得合理的结果。

contrib.en: Proposes conditional GANs as a general-purpose framework for image-to-image translation, learning both mapping and loss function.
contrib.zh: 提出条件生成对抗网络作为图像到图像翻译的通用框架，同时学习映射和损失函数。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effectiveness across diverse tasks: label-to-photo, edge-to-photo, colorization, etc., without task-specific engineering.
contrib.zh: 在标签到照片、边缘到照片、着色等多种任务上展示有效性，无需任务特定工程。

contrib.en: Introduces U-Net generator with skip connections to shuttle low-level information, improving output quality.
contrib.zh: 引入带跳跃连接的U-Net生成器以传递低级信息，提升输出质量。

contrib.en: Designs PatchGAN discriminator that penalizes structure at patch scale, enabling high-frequency detail modeling.
contrib.zh: 设计PatchGAN判别器在图像块尺度惩罚结构，实现高频细节建模。

contrib.en: Shows that L1 loss combined with adversarial loss reduces blurring and improves colorfulness.
contrib.zh: 展示L1损失与对抗损失结合可减少模糊并提升色彩丰富度。

contrib.en: Releases pix2pix software, enabling wide community adoption and creative applications.
contrib.zh: 发布pix2pix软件，促进社区广泛采用和创意应用。

limits.en: Conditional GANs produce limited stochasticity; dropout noise yields only minor output variation.
limits.zh: 条件GAN产生的随机性有限；dropout噪声仅带来微小输出变化。

limits.en: Method requires paired training data; not applicable to unpaired image translation tasks.
limits.zh: 方法需要成对训练数据；不适用于未配对的图像翻译任务。

limits.en: PatchGAN assumes local pixel independence, which may not hold for global structure tasks.
limits.zh: PatchGAN假设局部像素独立，可能不适用于全局结构任务。

limits.en: Performance on vision tasks like semantic segmentation is inferior to simple L1 regression.
limits.zh: 在语义分割等视觉任务上的表现不如简单的L1回归。

limits.en: Full-image GAN (ImageGAN) underperforms due to increased parameters and training difficulty.
limits.zh: 全图GAN（ImageGAN）因参数增多和训练困难而表现不佳。

items.en: We investigate conditional adversarial networks as a general-purpose solution to image-to-image translation problems. These networks not only learn the mapping from input image to output image, but also learn a loss function to train this mapping. This makes it possible to apply the same generic approach to problems that traditionally would require very different loss formulations. We demonstrate that this approach is effective at synthesizing photos from label maps, reconstructing objects from edge maps, and colorizing images, among other tasks. Indeed, since the release of the pix2pix software associated with this paper, a large number of internet users (many of them artists) have posted their own experiments with our system, further demonstrating its wide applicability and ease of adoption without the need for parameter tweaking. As a community, we no longer hand-engineer our mapping functions, and this work suggests we can achieve reasonable results without hand-engineering our loss functions either.
items.zh: 我们研究条件对抗网络作为图像到图像翻译问题的通用解决方案。这些网络不仅学习从输入图像到输出图像的映射，还学习一个损失函数来训练这个映射。这使得可以将相同的通用方法应用于传统上需要非常不同损失公式的问题。我们证明，这种方法在从标签图合成照片、从边缘图重建物体以及图像着色等任务中是有效的。事实上，自从与本文相关的pix2pix软件发布以来，大量互联网用户（其中许多是艺术家）已经发布了他们使用我们系统的实验，进一步展示了其广泛的适用性和无需参数调整的易用性。作为一个社区，我们不再手工设计映射函数，而这项工作表明，我们也可以在不手工设计损失函数的情况下获得合理的结果。

items.en: Many problems in image processing, computer graphics, and computer vision can be posed as “translating” an input image into a corresponding output image. Just as a concept may be expressed in either English or French, a scene may be rendered as an RGB image, a gradient field, an edge map, a semantic label map, etc. In analogy to automatic language translation, we define automatic image-to-image translation as the task of translating one possible representation of a scene into another, given sufficient training data (see Figure 1). Traditionally, each of these tasks has been tackled with separate, special-purpose machinery (e.g., [16, 25, 20, 9, 11, 53, 33, 39, 18, 58, 62]), despite the fact that the setting is always the same: predict pixels from pixels. Our goal in this paper is to develop a common framework for all these problems.
items.zh: 图像处理、计算机图形学和计算机视觉中的许多问题可以表述为将输入图像“翻译”成相应的输出图像。正如一个概念可以用英语或法语表达一样，一个场景可以渲染为RGB图像、梯度场、边缘图、语义标签图等。类比于自动语言翻译，我们将自动图像到图像翻译定义为在给定足够训练数据的情况下，将场景的一种可能表示翻译成另一种表示的任务（见图1）。传统上，这些任务中的每一个都是用单独的、专门的机制来处理的（例如，[16, 25, 20, 9, 11, 53, 33, 39, 18, 58, 62]），尽管设置总是相同的：从像素预测像素。本文的目标是为所有这些问题开发一个通用框架。

items.en: The community has already taken significant steps in this direction, with convolutional neural nets (CNNs) becoming the common workhorse behind a wide variety of image prediction problems. CNNs learn to minimize a loss function – an objective that scores the quality of results – and although the learning process is automatic, a lot of manual effort still goes into designing effective losses. In other words, we still have to tell the CNN what we wish it to minimize. But, just like King Midas, we must be careful what we wish for! If we take a naive approach and ask the CNN to minimize the Euclidean distance between predicted and ground truth pixels, it will tend to produce blurry results [43, 62]. This is because Euclidean distance is minimized by averaging all plausible outputs, which causes blurring. Coming up with loss functions that force the CNN to do what we really want – e.g., output sharp, realistic images – is an open problem and generally requires expert knowledge.
items.zh: 社区已经朝这个方向迈出了重要的一步，卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为各种图像预测问题的通用主力。CNN学习最小化一个损失函数——一个对结果质量进行评分的目标——尽管学习过程是自动的，但设计有效的损失仍然需要大量的人工努力。换句话说，我们仍然必须告诉CNN我们希望它最小化什么。但是，就像迈达斯国王一样，我们必须小心我们的愿望！如果我们采用简单的方法，要求CNN最小化预测像素与真实像素之间的欧几里得距离，它往往会生成模糊的结果[43, 62]。这是因为欧几里得距离通过平均所有可能的输出来最小化，这会导致模糊。提出迫使CNN做我们真正想做的事情（例如，输出清晰、逼真的图像）的损失函数是一个开放问题，通常需要专业知识。

items.en: It would be highly desirable if we could instead specify only a high-level goal, like “make the output indistinguishable from reality”, and then automatically learn a loss function appropriate for satisfying this goal. Fortunately, this is exactly what is done by the recently proposed Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) [24, 13, 44, 52, 63]. GANs learn a loss that tries to classify if the output image is real or fake, while simultaneously training a generative model to minimize this loss. Blurry images will not be tolerated since they look obviously fake. Because GANs learn a loss that adapts to the data, they can be applied to a multitude of tasks that traditionally would require very different kinds of loss functions.
items.zh: 如果我们能够只指定一个高级目标，比如“使输出与真实无法区分”，然后自动学习一个适合满足该目标的损失函数，那将是非常理想的。幸运的是，这正是最近提出的生成对抗网络（GANs）所做的[24, 13, 44, 52, 63]。GANs学习一个损失，试图判断输出图像是真实的还是伪造的，同时训练一个生成模型来最小化这个损失。模糊的图像不会被容忍，因为它们看起来明显是假的。由于GANs学习一个适应数据的损失，它们可以应用于许多传统上需要非常不同损失函数的任务。

items.en: In this paper, we explore GANs in the conditional setting. Just as GANs learn a generative model of data, conditional GANs (cGANs) learn a conditional generative model [24]. This makes cGANs suitable for image-to-image translation tasks, where we condition on an input image and generate a corresponding output image.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了条件设置下的GANs。正如GANs学习数据的生成模型一样，条件GANs（cGANs）学习条件生成模型[24]。这使得cGANs适用于图像到图像翻译任务，其中我们以输入图像为条件，生成相应的输出图像。

items.en: GANs have been vigorously studied in the last two years and many of the techniques we explore in this paper have been previously proposed. Nonetheless, earlier papers have focused on specific applications, and it has remained unclear how effective image-conditional GANs can be as a general-purpose solution for image-to-image translation. Our primary contribution is to demonstrate that on a wide variety of problems, conditional GANs produce reasonable results. Our second contribution is to present a simple framework sufficient to achieve good results, and to analyze the effects of several important architectural choices. Code is available at https://github.com/phillipi/pix2pix.
items.zh: GANs在过去两年中得到了广泛研究，我们在本文中探讨的许多技术之前已经被提出。尽管如此，早期的论文集中在特定应用上，尚不清楚图像条件GANs作为图像到图像翻译的通用解决方案能有多有效。我们的主要贡献是证明在广泛的问题上，条件GANs能产生合理的结果。我们的第二个贡献是提出了一个足以获得良好结果的简单框架，并分析了几种重要架构选择的影响。代码可在https://github.com/phillipi/pix2pix获取。

items.en: Structured losses for image modeling Image-to-image translation problems are often formulated as per-pixel classification or regression (e.g., [39, 58, 28, 35, 62]). These formulations treat the output space as “unstructured” in the sense that each output pixel is considered conditionally independent from all others given the input image. Conditional GANs instead learn a structured loss. Structured losses penalize the joint configuration of the output. A large body of literature has considered losses of this kind, with methods including conditional random fields [10], the SSIM metric [56], feature matching [15], nonparametric losses [37], the convolutional pseudo-prior [57], and losses based on matching covariance statistics [30]. The conditional GAN is different in that the loss is learned, and can, in theory, penalize any possible structure that differs between output and target.
items.zh: 图像建模的结构化损失 图像到图像翻译问题通常被表述为逐像素分类或回归（例如，[39, 58, 28, 35, 62]）。这些表述将输出空间视为“非结构化的”，即每个输出像素在给定输入图像的情况下被认为条件独立于所有其他像素。条件GANs则学习一个结构化损失。结构化损失惩罚输出的联合配置。大量文献考虑了这类损失，方法包括条件随机场[10]、SSIM度量[56]、特征匹配[15]、非参数损失[37]、卷积伪先验[57]以及基于匹配协方差统计的损失[30]。条件GAN的不同之处在于损失是学习的，并且理论上可以惩罚输出和目标之间任何可能的结构差异。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Training a conditional GAN to map edges→→\rightarrowphoto. The discriminator, D𝐷D, learns to classify between fake (synthesized by the generator) and real {edge, photo} tuples. The generator, G𝐺G, learns to fool the discriminator. Unlike an unconditional GAN, both the generator and discriminator observe the input edge map.
items.capZh: 图2：训练条件GAN将边缘→照片。判别器D学习区分伪造（由生成器合成）和真实的{边缘，照片}元组。生成器G学习欺骗判别器。与无条件GAN不同，生成器和判别器都观察输入边缘图。

items.en: Conditional GANs We are not the first to apply GANs in the conditional setting. Prior and concurrent works have conditioned GANs on discrete labels [41, 23, 13], text [46], and, indeed, images. The image-conditional models have tackled image prediction from a normal map [55], future frame prediction [40], product photo generation [59], and image generation from sparse annotations [31, 48] (c.f. [47] for an autoregressive approach to the same problem). Several other papers have also used GANs for image-to-image mappings, but only applied the GAN unconditionally, relying on other terms (such as L2 regression) to force the output to be conditioned on the input. These papers have achieved impressive results on inpainting [43], future state prediction [64], image manipulation guided by user constraints [65], style transfer [38], and superresolution [36]. Each of the methods was tailored for a specific application. Our framework differs in that nothing is application-specific. This makes our setup considerably simpler than most others.
items.zh: 条件GANs 我们不是第一个在条件设置下应用GANs的。先前和并行的工作已经将GANs条件于离散标签[41, 23, 13]、文本[46]以及图像上。图像条件模型已经处理了从法线图预测图像[55]、未来帧预测[40]、产品照片生成[59]以及从稀疏标注生成图像[31, 48]（参见[47]中针对同一问题的自回归方法）。其他几篇论文也使用GANs进行图像到图像映射，但仅无条件地应用GAN，依赖其他项（如L2回归）来强制输出以输入为条件。这些论文在修复[43]、未来状态预测[64]、用户约束引导的图像操作[65]、风格迁移[38]和超分辨率[36]方面取得了令人印象深刻的结果。每种方法都是针对特定应用量身定制的。我们的框架的不同之处在于没有应用特定性。这使得我们的设置比大多数其他设置简单得多。

items.en: Our method also differs from the prior works in several architectural choices for the generator and discriminator. Unlike past work, for our generator we use a “U-Net”-based architecture [50], and for our discriminator we use a convolutional “PatchGAN” classifier, which only penalizes structure at the scale of image patches. A similar PatchGAN architecture was previously proposed in [38] to capture local style statistics. Here we show that this approach is effective on a wider range of problems, and we investigate the effect of changing the patch size.
items.zh: 我们的方法在生成器和判别器的几个架构选择上也与先前的工作不同。与过去的工作不同，对于我们的生成器，我们使用基于“U-Net”的架构[50]，对于我们的判别器，我们使用卷积“PatchGAN”分类器，它只惩罚图像块尺度上的结构。类似的PatchGAN架构先前在[38]中被提出用于捕获局部风格统计。在这里，我们表明这种方法在更广泛的问题上是有效的，并研究了改变块大小的效果。

items.en: GANs are generative models that learn a mapping from random noise vector z𝑧z to output image y𝑦y, G:z→y:𝐺→𝑧𝑦G:z\rightarrow y [24]. In contrast, conditional GANs learn a mapping from observed image x𝑥x and random noise vector z𝑧z, to y𝑦y, G:{x,z}→y:𝐺→𝑥𝑧𝑦G:\{x,z\}\rightarrow y. The generator G𝐺G is trained to produce outputs that cannot be distinguished from “real” images by an adversarially trained discriminator, D𝐷D, which is trained to do as well as possible at detecting the generator’s “fakes”. This training procedure is diagrammed in Figure 2.
items.zh: GANs是生成模型，学习从随机噪声向量z到输出图像y的映射，G:z→y [24]。相比之下，条件GANs学习从观察到的图像x和随机噪声向量z到y的映射，G:{x,z}→y。生成器G被训练产生无法被对抗训练的判别器D与“真实”图像区分开的输出，而判别器D被训练尽可能好地检测生成器的“伪造品”。这个训练过程如图2所示。

items.en: To test the importance of conditioning the discriminator, we also compare to an unconditional variant in which the discriminator does not observe x𝑥x:
items.zh: 为了测试判别器条件的重要性，我们还与一个无条件变体进行了比较，其中判别器不观察x：

items.en: Previous approaches have found it beneficial to mix the GAN objective with a more traditional loss, such as L2 distance [43]. The discriminator’s job remains unchanged, but the generator is tasked to not only fool the discriminator but also to be near the ground truth output in an L2 sense. We also explore this option, using L1 distance rather than L2 as L1 encourages less blurring:
items.zh: 先前的方法发现将GAN目标与更传统的损失（如L2距离）混合是有益的[43]。判别器的工作保持不变，但生成器的任务不仅是欺骗判别器，还要在L2意义上接近真实输出。我们也探索了这个选项，使用L1距离而不是L2，因为L1鼓励更少的模糊：

items.en: Without z𝑧z, the net could still learn a mapping from x𝑥x to y𝑦y, but would produce deterministic outputs, and therefore fail to match any distribution other than a delta function. Past conditional GANs have acknowledged this and provided Gaussian noise z𝑧z as an input to the generator, in addition to x𝑥x (e.g., [55]). In initial experiments, we did not find this strategy effective – the generator simply learned to ignore the noise – which is consistent with Mathieu et al. [40]. Instead, for our final models, we provide noise only in the form of dropout, applied on several layers of our generator at both training and test time. Despite the dropout noise, we observe only minor stochasticity in the output of our nets. Designing conditional GANs that produce highly stochastic output, and thereby capture the full entropy of the conditional distributions they model, is an important question left open by the present work.
items.zh: 没有z，网络仍然可以学习从x到y的映射，但会产生确定性输出，因此无法匹配除delta函数之外的任何分布。过去的条件GANs已经认识到这一点，并在生成器的输入中除了x之外还提供了高斯噪声z（例如，[55]）。在初步实验中，我们发现这种策略无效——生成器只是学会了忽略噪声——这与Mathieu等人[40]一致。相反，对于我们的最终模型，我们仅以dropout的形式提供噪声，在训练和测试时应用于生成器的多个层。尽管有dropout噪声，我们观察到网络输出的随机性很小。设计产生高度随机输出、从而捕获其建模的条件分布的全部熵的条件GANs，是当前工作留下的一个重要问题。

items.en: We adapt our generator and discriminator architectures from those in [44]. Both generator and discriminator use modules of the form convolution-BatchNorm-ReLu [29]. Details of the architecture are provided in the supplemental materials online, with key features discussed below.
items.zh: 我们根据[44]中的架构调整了生成器和判别器的架构。生成器和判别器都使用卷积-BatchNorm-ReLu形式的模块[29]。架构细节在在线补充材料中提供，关键特征如下所述。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Two choices for the architecture of the generator. The “U-Net” [50] is an encoder-decoder with skip connections between mirrored layers in the encoder and decoder stacks.
items.capZh: 图3：生成器架构的两种选择。“U-Net”[50]是一种编码器-解码器，在编码器和解码器堆栈中的镜像层之间具有跳跃连接。

items.en: A defining feature of image-to-image translation problems is that they map a high resolution input grid to a high resolution output grid. In addition, for the problems we consider, the input and output differ in surface appearance, but both are renderings of the same underlying structure. Therefore, structure in the input is roughly aligned with structure in the output. We design the generator architecture around these considerations.
items.zh: 图像到图像翻译问题的一个定义性特征是它们将高分辨率输入网格映射到高分辨率输出网格。此外，对于我们考虑的问题，输入和输出在表面外观上不同，但两者都是相同底层结构的渲染。因此，输入中的结构与输出中的结构大致对齐。我们围绕这些考虑设计生成器架构。

items.en: Many previous solutions [43, 55, 30, 64, 59] to problems in this area have used an encoder-decoder network [26]. In such a network, the input is passed through a series of layers that progressively downsample, until a bottleneck layer, at which point the process is reversed. Such a network requires that all information flow pass through all the layers, including the bottleneck. For many image translation problems, there is a great deal of low-level information shared between the input and output, and it would be desirable to shuttle this information directly across the net. For example, in the case of image colorization, the input and output share the location of prominent edges.
items.zh: 许多先前的解决方案[43, 55, 30, 64, 59]在该领域的问题中使用了编码器-解码器网络[26]。在这种网络中，输入通过一系列逐渐下采样的层，直到一个瓶颈层，然后过程反转。这样的网络要求所有信息流通过所有层，包括瓶颈。对于许多图像翻译问题，输入和输出之间共享大量低级信息，直接通过网络传递这些信息将是可取的。例如，在图像着色的情况下，输入和输出共享显著边缘的位置。

items.en: To give the generator a means to circumvent the bottleneck for information like this, we add skip connections, following the general shape of a “U-Net” [50]. Specifically, we add skip connections between each layer i𝑖i and layer n−i𝑛𝑖n-i, where n𝑛n is the total number of layers. Each skip connection simply concatenates all channels at layer i𝑖i with those at layer n−i𝑛𝑖n-i.
items.zh: 为了让生成器能够绕过此类信息的瓶颈，我们添加了跳跃连接，遵循“U-Net”[50]的总体形状。具体来说，我们在每一层 i 和层 n−i 之间添加跳跃连接，其中 n 是总层数。每个跳跃连接只是将层 i 的所有通道与层 n−i 的通道拼接起来。

items.en: It is well known that the L2 loss – and L1, see Figure 4 – produces blurry results on image generation problems [34]. Although these losses fail to encourage high-frequency crispness, in many cases they nonetheless accurately capture the low frequencies. For problems where this is the case, we do not need an entirely new framework to enforce correctness at the low frequencies. L1 will already do.
items.zh: 众所周知，L2损失——以及L1损失，见图4——在图像生成问题上会产生模糊的结果[34]。尽管这些损失无法鼓励高频清晰度，但在许多情况下，它们仍然能准确捕捉低频信息。对于这种情况，我们不需要一个全新的框架来强制低频的正确性。L1已经可以做到这一点。

items.en: This motivates restricting the GAN discriminator to only model high-frequency structure, relying on an L1 term to force low-frequency correctness (Eqn. 4). In order to model high-frequencies, it is sufficient to restrict our attention to the structure in local image patches. Therefore, we design a discriminator architecture – which we term a PatchGAN – that only penalizes structure at the scale of patches. This discriminator tries to classify if each N×N𝑁𝑁N\times N patch in an image is real or fake. We run this discriminator convolutionally across the image, averaging all responses to provide the ultimate output of D𝐷D.
items.zh: 这促使我们将GAN判别器限制为仅对高频结构建模，依靠L1项来强制低频正确性（公式4）。为了对高频进行建模，只需将注意力限制在局部图像块的结构上即可。因此，我们设计了一种判别器架构——我们称之为PatchGAN——它仅惩罚图像块尺度上的结构。该判别器试图对图像中的每个 N×N 块进行分类，判断其是真实还是虚假。我们以卷积方式在整个图像上运行该判别器，对所有响应进行平均，以提供 D 的最终输出。

items.en: In Section 4.4, we demonstrate that N𝑁N can be much smaller than the full size of the image and still produce high quality results. This is advantageous because a smaller PatchGAN has fewer parameters, runs faster, and can be applied to arbitrarily large images.
items.zh: 在第4.4节中，我们证明 N 可以远小于图像的完整尺寸，并且仍然能产生高质量的结果。这是有利的，因为较小的PatchGAN参数更少，运行速度更快，并且可以应用于任意大的图像。

items.en: Such a discriminator effectively models the image as a Markov random field, assuming independence between pixels separated by more than a patch diameter. This connection was previously explored in [38], and is also the common assumption in models of texture [17, 21] and style [16, 25, 22, 37]. Therefore, our PatchGAN can be understood as a form of texture/style loss.
items.zh: 这样的判别器有效地将图像建模为马尔可夫随机场，假设像素之间距离超过一个块直径时相互独立。这种联系在[38]中已有探讨，也是纹理[17, 21]和风格[16, 25, 22, 37]模型中的常见假设。因此，我们的PatchGAN可以理解为一种纹理/风格损失。

items.en: To optimize our networks, we follow the standard approach from [24]: we alternate between one gradient descent step on D𝐷D, then one step on G𝐺G. As suggested in the original GAN paper, rather than training G𝐺G to minimize log(1−D(x,G(x,z))\log(1-D(x,G(x,z)), we instead train to maximize log⁡D​(x,G​(x,z))𝐷𝑥𝐺𝑥𝑧\log D(x,G(x,z)) [24]. In addition, we divide the objective by 222 while optimizing D𝐷D, which slows down the rate at which D𝐷D learns relative to G𝐺G. We use minibatch SGD and apply the Adam solver [32], with a learning rate of 0.00020.00020.0002, and momentum parameters β1=0.5subscript𝛽10.5\beta_{1}=0.5, β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999.
items.zh: 为了优化我们的网络，我们遵循[24]中的标准方法：在 D 上执行一步梯度下降，然后在 G 上执行一步。如原始GAN论文中所建议的，我们不是训练 G 以最小化 log(1−D(x,G(x,z)))，而是训练它以最大化 log D(x,G(x,z)) [24]。此外，在优化 D 时，我们将目标除以 2，这减慢了 D 相对于 G 的学习速度。我们使用小批量SGD并应用Adam求解器[32]，学习率为0.0002，动量参数 β1=0.5，β2=0.999。

items.en: At inference time, we run the generator net in exactly the same manner as during the training phase. This differs from the usual protocol in that we apply dropout at test time, and we apply batch normalization [29] using the statistics of the test batch, rather than aggregated statistics of the training batch. This approach to batch normalization, when the batch size is set to 1, has been termed “instance normalization” and has been demonstrated to be effective at image generation tasks [54]. In our experiments, we use batch sizes between 1 and 10 depending on the experiment.
items.zh: 在推理时，我们以与训练阶段完全相同的方式运行生成器网络。这与通常的协议不同，因为我们在测试时应用了dropout，并且使用测试批次的统计信息（而非训练批次的聚合统计信息）来应用批归一化[29]。这种批归一化方法，当批次大小设置为1时，被称为“实例归一化”，并已被证明在图像生成任务中有效[54]。在我们的实验中，根据实验不同，我们使用的批次大小在1到10之间。

items.en: To explore the generality of conditional GANs, we test the method on a variety of tasks and datasets, including both graphics tasks, like photo generation, and vision tasks, like semantic segmentation:
items.zh: 为了探索条件GAN的通用性，我们在各种任务和数据集上测试了该方法，包括图形任务（如照片生成）和视觉任务（如语义分割）：

items.en: Semantic labels↔↔\leftrightarrowphoto, trained on the Cityscapes dataset [12].
items.zh: 语义标签↔照片，在Cityscapes数据集[12]上训练。

items.en: Architectural labels→→\rightarrowphoto, trained on CMP Facades [45].
items.zh: 建筑标签→照片，在CMP Facades[45]上训练。

items.en: Map↔↔\leftrightarrowaerial photo, trained on data scraped from Google Maps.
items.zh: 地图↔航拍照片，在从Google Maps抓取的数据上训练。

items.en: BW→→\rightarrowcolor photos, trained on [51].
items.zh: 黑白→彩色照片，在[51]上训练。

items.en: Edges→→\rightarrowphoto, trained on data from [65] and [60]; binary edges generated using the HED edge detector [58] plus postprocessing.
items.zh: 边缘→照片，在[65]和[60]的数据上训练；使用HED边缘检测器[58]加后处理生成二值边缘。

items.en: Sketch→→\rightarrowphoto: tests edges→→\rightarrowphoto models on human-drawn sketches from [19].
items.zh: 草图→照片：在来自[19]的人类绘制草图上测试边缘→照片模型。

items.en: Thermal→→\rightarrowcolor photos, trained on data from [27].
items.zh: 热成像→彩色照片，在来自[27]的数据上训练。

items.en: Photo with missing pixels→→\rightarrowinpainted photo, trained on Paris StreetView from [14].
items.zh: 缺失像素的照片→修复后的照片，在来自[14]的Paris StreetView上训练。

items.en: Details of training on each of these datasets are provided in the supplemental materials online. In all cases, the input and output are simply 1-3 channel images. Qualitative results are shown in Figures 8, 9, 11, 10, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20. Several failure cases are highlighted in Figure 21. More comprehensive results are available at https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/.
items.zh: 每个数据集上的训练细节在在线补充材料中提供。在所有情况下，输入和输出都是简单的1-3通道图像。定性结果如图8、9、11、10、13、14、15、16、17、18、19、20所示。几个失败案例在图21中突出显示。更全面的结果可在 https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/ 获取。

items.en: Data requirements and speed We note that decent results can often be obtained even on small datasets. Our facade training set consists of just 400 images (see results in Figure 14), and the day to night training set consists of only 91 unique webcams (see results in Figure 15). On datasets of this size, training can be very fast: for example, the results shown in Figure 14 took less than two hours of training on a single Pascal Titan X GPU. At test time, all models run in well under a second on this GPU.
items.zh: 数据需求和速度 我们注意到，即使在小数据集上，也常常能获得不错的结果。我们的立面训练集仅包含400张图像（结果见图14），昼夜训练集仅包含91个独特的网络摄像头（结果见图15）。在这种规模的数据集上，训练可以非常快：例如，图14所示的结果在单个Pascal Titan X GPU上训练不到两小时。在测试时，所有模型在该GPU上的运行时间远低于一秒。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Different losses induce different quality of results. Each column shows results trained under a different loss. Please see https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/ for additional examples.
items.capZh: 图4：不同的损失会导致不同的结果质量。每一列显示在不同损失下训练的结果。更多示例请参见 https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/。

items.en: Evaluating the quality of synthesized images is an open and difficult problem [52]. Traditional metrics such as per-pixel mean-squared error do not assess joint statistics of the result, and therefore do not measure the very structure that structured losses aim to capture.
items.zh: 评估合成图像的质量是一个开放且困难的问题[52]。传统的指标如逐像素均方误差不评估结果的联合统计特性，因此无法衡量结构化损失旨在捕捉的结构本身。

items.en: To more holistically evaluate the visual quality of our results, we employ two tactics. First, we run “real vs. fake” perceptual studies on Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT). For graphics problems like colorization and photo generation, plausibility to a human observer is often the ultimate goal. Therefore, we test our map generation, aerial photo generation, and image colorization using this approach.
items.zh: 为了更全面地评估我们结果的视觉质量，我们采用了两种策略。首先，我们在亚马逊土耳其机器人（AMT）上进行了“真实与虚假”感知研究。对于诸如着色和照片生成等图形问题，对人类观察者的可信度通常是最终目标。因此，我们使用这种方法测试了我们的地图生成、航拍照片生成和图像着色。

items.en: Second, we measure whether or not our synthesized cityscapes are realistic enough that off-the-shelf recognition system can recognize the objects in them. This metric is similar to the “inception score” from [52], the object detection evaluation in [55], and the “semantic interpretability” measures in [62] and [42].
items.zh: 其次，我们测量了合成的城市景观图像是否足够逼真，以至于现成的识别系统能够识别其中的物体。该指标类似于[52]中的“初始分数”、[55]中的目标检测评估以及[62]和[42]中的“语义可解释性”度量。

items.en: AMT perceptual studies For our AMT experiments, we followed the protocol from [62]: Turkers were presented with a series of trials that pitted a “real” image against a “fake” image generated by our algorithm. On each trial, each image appeared for 1 second, after which the images disappeared and Turkers were given unlimited time to respond as to which was fake. The first 10 images of each session were practice and Turkers were given feedback. No feedback was provided on the 40 trials of the main experiment. Each session tested just one algorithm at a time, and Turkers were not allowed to complete more than one session. ∼50similar-toabsent50\sim 50 Turkers evaluated each algorithm. Unlike [62], we did not include vigilance trials. For our colorization experiments, the real and fake images were generated from the same grayscale input. For map↔↔\leftrightarrowaerial photo, the real and fake images were not generated from the same input, in order to make the task more difficult and avoid floor-level results. For map↔↔\leftrightarrowaerial photo, we trained on 256×256256256256\times 256 resolution images, but exploited fully-convolutional translation (described above) to test on 512×512512512512\times 512 images, which were then downsampled and presented to Turkers at 256×256256256256\times 256 resolution. For colorization, we trained and tested on 256×256256256256\times 256 resolution images and presented the results to Turkers at this same resolution.
items.zh: AMT感知研究 对于我们的AMT实验，我们遵循了[62]中的协议：土耳其工人被呈现一系列试验，每次试验将一张“真实”图像与我们的算法生成的“虚假”图像进行对比。在每次试验中，每张图像出现1秒，之后图像消失，土耳其工人有无限时间回答哪张是虚假的。每个会话的前10张图像是练习，并给予土耳其工人反馈。主实验的40次试验中不提供反馈。每个会话一次只测试一种算法，且土耳其工人不允许完成超过一个会话。约50名土耳其工人评估了每种算法。与[62]不同，我们没有包含警惕性试验。对于我们的着色实验，真实和虚假图像来自相同的灰度输入。对于地图↔航拍照片，真实和虚假图像并非来自相同的输入，以使任务更困难并避免地板效应。对于地图↔航拍照片，我们在256×256分辨率图像上训练，但利用全卷积翻译（如上所述）在512×512图像上测试，然后降采样并以256×256分辨率呈现给土耳其工人。对于着色，我们在256×256分辨率图像上训练和测试，并以相同分辨率将结果呈现给土耳其工人。

items.en: “FCN-score” While quantitative evaluation of generative models is known to be challenging, recent works [52, 55, 62, 42] have tried using pre-trained semantic classifiers to measure the discriminability of the generated stimuli as a pseudo-metric. The intuition is that if the generated images are realistic, classifiers trained on real images will be able to classify the synthesized image correctly as well. To this end, we adopt the popular FCN-8s [39] architecture for semantic segmentation, and train it on the cityscapes dataset. We then score synthesized photos by the classification accuracy against the labels these photos were synthesized from.
items.zh: “FCN分数” 虽然生成模型的定量评估已知具有挑战性，但最近的工作[52, 55, 62, 42]尝试使用预训练的语义分类器来测量生成刺激的可判别性作为伪度量。直觉是，如果生成的图像是逼真的，那么在真实图像上训练的分类器也能正确分类合成图像。为此，我们采用流行的FCN-8s[39]架构进行语义分割，并在Cityscapes数据集上训练。然后，我们根据合成照片与合成这些照片的标签的分类准确率对合成照片进行评分。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Adding skip connections to an encoder-decoder to create a “U-Net” results in much higher quality results.
items.capZh: 图5：向编码器-解码器添加跳跃连接以创建“U-Net”可产生更高质量的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Patch size variations. Uncertainty in the output manifests itself differently for different loss functions. Uncertain regions become blurry and desaturated under L1. The 1x1 PixelGAN encourages greater color diversity but has no effect on spatial statistics. The 16x16 PatchGAN creates locally sharp results, but also leads to tiling artifacts beyond the scale it can observe. The 70×\times70 PatchGAN forces outputs that are sharp, even if incorrect, in both the spatial and spectral (colorfulness) dimensions. The full 286×\times286 ImageGAN produces results that are visually similar to the 70×\times70 PatchGAN, but somewhat lower quality according to our FCN-score metric (Table 3). Please see https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/ for additional examples.
items.capZh: 图6：补丁大小变化。输出中的不确定性对不同损失函数的表现不同。不确定区域在L1下变得模糊和去饱和。1x1 PixelGAN鼓励更大的颜色多样性，但对空间统计没有影响。16x16 PatchGAN产生局部锐利的结果，但也导致超出其可观察范围的平铺伪影。70×70 PatchGAN强制输出在空间和光谱（色彩丰富度）维度上锐利，即使不正确。完整的286×286 ImageGAN产生的结果在视觉上与70×70 PatchGAN相似，但根据我们的FCN分数指标（表3）质量略低。更多示例请参见https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/。

items.en: Which components of the objective in Eqn. 4 are important? We run ablation studies to isolate the effect of the L1 term, the GAN term, and to compare using a discriminator conditioned on the input (cGAN, Eqn. 1) against using an unconditional discriminator (GAN, Eqn. 2).
items.zh: 公式4中目标的哪些组成部分是重要的？我们进行消融研究以隔离L1项、GAN项的影响，并比较使用条件判别器（cGAN，公式1）与使用无条件判别器（GAN，公式2）的效果。

items.en: We quantify these observations using the FCN-score on the cityscapes labels→→\rightarrowphoto task (Table 1): the GAN-based objectives achieve higher scores, indicating that the synthesized images include more recognizable structure. We also test the effect of removing conditioning from the discriminator (labeled as GAN). In this case, the loss does not penalize mismatch between the input and output; it only cares that the output look realistic. This variant results in poor performance; examining the results reveals that the generator collapsed into producing nearly the exact same output regardless of input photograph. Clearly, it is important, in this case, that the loss measure the quality of the match between input and output, and indeed cGAN performs much better than GAN. Note, however, that adding an L1 term also encourages that the output respect the input, since the L1 loss penalizes the distance between ground truth outputs, which correctly match the input, and synthesized outputs, which may not. Correspondingly, L1+GAN is also effective at creating realistic renderings that respect the input label maps. Combining all terms, L1+cGAN, performs similarly well.
items.zh: 我们使用Cityscapes标签→照片任务上的FCN分数（表1）量化这些观察结果：基于GAN的目标获得更高的分数，表明合成图像包含更多可识别的结构。我们还测试了从判别器中移除条件（标记为GAN）的效果。在这种情况下，损失不惩罚输入和输出之间的不匹配；它只关心输出看起来真实。这种变体导致性能不佳；检查结果发现，生成器几乎崩溃为产生完全相同的输出，无论输入照片如何。显然，在这种情况下，损失衡量输入和输出之间匹配的质量很重要，实际上cGAN的表现远优于GAN。然而，请注意，添加L1项也鼓励输出尊重输入，因为L1损失惩罚了正确匹配输入的真实输出与可能不匹配的合成输出之间的距离。相应地，L1+GAN在创建尊重输入标签图的逼真渲染方面也有效。结合所有项，L1+cGAN表现同样良好。

items.en: Colorfulness A striking effect of conditional GANs is that they produce sharp images, hallucinating spatial structure even where it does not exist in the input label map. One might imagine cGANs have a similar effect on “sharpening” in the spectral dimension – i.e. making images more colorful. Just as L1 will incentivize a blur when it is uncertain where exactly to locate an edge, it will also incentivize an average, grayish color when it is uncertain which of several plausible color values a pixel should take on. Specially, L1 will be minimized by choosing the median of the conditional probability density function over possible colors. An adversarial loss, on the other hand, can in principle become aware that grayish outputs are unrealistic, and encourage matching the true color distribution [24]. In Figure 7, we investigate whether our cGANs actually achieve this effect on the Cityscapes dataset. The plots show the marginal distributions over output color values in Lab color space. The ground truth distributions are shown with a dotted line. It is apparent that L1 leads to a narrower distribution than the ground truth, confirming the hypothesis that L1 encourages average, grayish colors. Using a cGAN, on the other hand, pushes the output distribution closer to the ground truth.
items.zh: 色彩丰富度 条件GAN的一个显著效果是它们产生锐利的图像，即使在输入标签图中不存在空间结构的地方也能幻觉出空间结构。可以想象cGAN在光谱维度上也有类似的“锐化”效果——即让图像更鲜艳。正如L1在不确定边缘确切位置时会激励模糊一样，它也会在不确定像素应取哪个合理颜色值时激励平均的灰色。特别地，L1将通过选择可能颜色的条件概率密度函数的中位数来最小化。另一方面，对抗性损失原则上可以意识到灰色输出是不真实的，并鼓励匹配真实的颜色分布[24]。在图7中，我们研究了cGAN是否在Cityscapes数据集上实现了这种效果。这些图显示了Lab颜色空间中输出颜色值的边际分布。真实分布用虚线显示。显然，L1导致比真实分布更窄的分布，证实了L1鼓励平均、灰色颜色的假设。而使用cGAN则将输出分布推向更接近真实分布。

items.en: A U-Net architecture allows low-level information to shortcut across the network. Does this lead to better results? Figure 5 and Table 2 compare the U-Net against an encoder-decoder on cityscape generation. The encoder-decoder is created simply by severing the skip connections in the U-Net. The encoder-decoder is unable to learn to generate realistic images in our experiments. The advantages of the U-Net appear not to be specific to conditional GANs: when both U-Net and encoder-decoder are trained with an L1 loss, the U-Net again achieves the superior results.
items.zh: U-Net架构允许低级信息通过网络捷径。这是否会带来更好的结果？图5和表2比较了U-Net与编码器-解码器在城市景观生成上的表现。编码器-解码器通过切断U-Net中的跳跃连接简单创建。在我们的实验中，编码器-解码器无法学习生成逼真的图像。U-Net的优势似乎并非特定于条件GAN：当U-Net和编码器-解码器都使用L1损失训练时，U-Net再次获得更优的结果。

full.sec: 4.4 From PixelGANs to PatchGANs to ImageGANs

items.en: We test the effect of varying the patch size N𝑁N of our discriminator receptive fields, from a 1×1111\times 1 “PixelGAN” to a full 286×286286286286\times 286 “ImageGAN”111We achieve this variation in patch size by adjusting the depth of the GAN discriminator. Details of this process, and the discriminator architectures, are provided in the in the supplemental materials online.. Figure 6 shows qualitative results of this analysis and Table 3 quantifies the effects using the FCN-score. Note that elsewhere in this paper, unless specified, all experiments use 70×70707070\times 70 PatchGANs, and for this section all experiments use an L1+cGAN loss.
items.zh: 我们测试了改变判别器感受野的补丁大小N的效果，从1×1的“PixelGAN”到完整的286×286的“ImageGAN”¹。图6显示了该分析的定性结果，表3使用FCN分数量化了效果。请注意，在本文其他部分，除非另有说明，所有实验均使用70×70 PatchGAN，并且在本节中所有实验均使用L1+cGAN损失。

items.en: The PixelGAN has no effect on spatial sharpness but does increase the colorfulness of the results (quantified in Figure 7). For example, the bus in Figure 6 is painted gray when the net is trained with an L1 loss, but becomes red with the PixelGAN loss. Color histogram matching is a common problem in image processing [49], and PixelGANs may be a promising lightweight solution.
items.zh: PixelGAN对空间锐度没有影响，但确实增加了结果的色彩丰富度（在图7中量化）。例如，图6中的公交车在使用L1损失训练时被涂成灰色，但在PixelGAN损失下变成红色。颜色直方图匹配是图像处理中的一个常见问题[49]，PixelGAN可能是一种有前景的轻量级解决方案。

items.en: Using a 16×16161616\times 16 PatchGAN is sufficient to promote sharp outputs, and achieves good FCN-scores, but also leads to tiling artifacts. The 70×70707070\times 70 PatchGAN alleviates these artifacts and achieves slightly better scores. Scaling beyond this, to the full 286×286286286286\times 286 ImageGAN, does not appear to improve the visual quality of the results, and in fact gets a considerably lower FCN-score (Table 3). This may be because the ImageGAN has many more parameters and greater depth than the 70×70707070\times 70 PatchGAN, and may be harder to train.
items.zh: 使用16×16 PatchGAN足以促进锐利输出，并获得良好的FCN分数，但也会导致平铺伪影。70×70 PatchGAN减轻了这些伪影，并获得了略高的分数。扩展到完整的286×286 ImageGAN似乎并未改善结果的视觉质量，实际上获得了相当低的FCN分数（表3）。这可能是因为ImageGAN比70×70 PatchGAN具有更多的参数和更大的深度，可能更难训练。

items.en: Fully-convolutional translation An advantage of the PatchGAN is that a fixed-size patch discriminator can be applied to arbitrarily large images. We may also apply the generator convolutionally, on larger images than those on which it was trained. We test this on the map↔↔\leftrightarrowaerial photo task. After training a generator on 256×256256256256\times 256 images, we test it on 512×512512512512\times 512 images. The results in Figure 8 demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach.
items.zh: 全卷积翻译 PatchGAN的一个优点是固定大小的补丁判别器可以应用于任意大的图像。我们也可以将生成器卷积地应用于比训练时更大的图像。我们在地图↔航拍照片任务上测试了这一点。在256×256图像上训练生成器后，我们在512×512图像上测试。图8中的结果展示了这种方法的有效性。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Example results on Google Maps at 512x512 resolution (model was trained on images at 256×256256256256\times 256 resolution, and run convolutionally on the larger images at test time). Contrast adjusted for clarity.
items.capZh: 图8：Google Maps上512x512分辨率的示例结果（模型在256×256分辨率图像上训练，并在测试时卷积地应用于更大图像）。对比度已调整以提高清晰度。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Colorization results of conditional GANs versus the L2 regression from [62] and the full method (classification with rebalancing) from [64]. The cGANs can produce compelling colorizations (first two rows), but have a common failure mode of producing a grayscale or desaturated result (last row).
items.capZh: 图9：条件GAN与[62]中的L2回归以及[64]中的完整方法（带重平衡的分类）的着色结果比较。cGAN可以产生引人注目的着色（前两行），但有一个常见的失败模式是产生灰度或去饱和的结果（最后一行）。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Applying a conditional GAN to semantic segmentation. The cGAN produces sharp images that look at glance like the ground truth, but in fact include many small, hallucinated objects.
items.capZh: 图10：将条件GAN应用于语义分割。cGAN产生锐利的图像，乍看之下像真实图像，但实际上包含许多小的、幻觉出的物体。

items.en: We validate the perceptual realism of our results on the tasks of map↔↔\leftrightarrowaerial photograph and grayscale→→\rightarrowcolor. Results of our AMT experiment for map↔↔\leftrightarrowphoto are given in Table 4. The aerial photos generated by our method fooled participants on 18.9%percent18.918.9\% of trials, significantly above the L1 baseline, which produces blurry results and nearly never fooled participants. In contrast, in the photo→→\rightarrowmap direction our method only fooled participants on 6.16.16.1% of trials, and this was not significantly different than the performance of the L1 baseline (based on bootstrap test). This may be because minor structural errors are more visible in maps, which have rigid geometry, than in aerial photographs, which are more chaotic.
items.zh: 我们在地图↔航拍照片和灰度→彩色任务上验证了结果的感知真实感。地图↔照片的AMT实验结果见表4。我们的方法生成的航拍照片在18.9%的试验中欺骗了参与者，显著高于L1基线（该基线产生模糊结果，几乎从未欺骗参与者）。相反，在照片→地图方向上，我们的方法仅在6.1%的试验中欺骗了参与者，这与L1基线的表现没有显著差异（基于bootstrap检验）。这可能是因为地图具有刚性几何结构，微小的结构错误比在更混乱的航拍照片中更明显。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Example applications developed by online community based on our pix2pix codebase: #edges2cats [3] by Christopher Hesse, Background removal [6] by Kaihu Chen, Palette generation [5] by Jack Qiao, Sketch →→\rightarrow Portrait [7] by Mario Klingemann, Sketch→→\rightarrow Pokemon [1] by Bertrand Gondouin, “Do As I Do” pose transfer [2] by Brannon Dorsey, and #fotogenerator by Bosman et al. [4].
items.capZh: 图11：在线社区基于我们的pix2pix代码库开发的应用示例：#edges2cats [3]（Christopher Hesse）、背景去除 [6]（Kaihu Chen）、调色板生成 [5]（Jack Qiao）、素描→肖像 [7]（Mario Klingemann）、素描→宝可梦 [1]（Bertrand Gondouin）、“Do As I Do”姿态迁移 [2]（Brannon Dorsey）以及Bosman等人的#fotogenerator [4]。

items.en: We trained colorization on ImageNet [51], and tested on the test split introduced by [62, 35]. Our method, with L1+cGAN loss, fooled participants on 22.5%percent22.522.5\% of trials (Table 5). We also tested the results of [62] and a variant of their method that used an L2 loss (see [62] for details). The conditional GAN scored similarly to the L2 variant of [62] (difference insignificant by bootstrap test), but fell short of [62]’s full method, which fooled participants on 27.8%percent27.827.8\% of trials in our experiment. We note that their method was specifically engineered to do well on colorization.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet [51]上训练了着色模型，并在[62, 35]引入的测试集上进行了测试。我们的方法（使用L1+cGAN损失）在22.5%的试验中欺骗了参与者（表5）。我们还测试了[62]的结果及其使用L2损失的变体（详见[62]）。条件GAN的表现与[62]的L2变体相似（bootstrap检验差异不显著），但不及[62]的完整方法（在我们的实验中，该方法在27.8%的试验中欺骗了参与者）。我们注意到，他们的方法是专门为着色任务精心设计的。

items.en: Conditional GANs appear to be effective on problems where the output is highly detailed or photographic, as is common in image processing and graphics tasks. What about vision problems, like semantic segmentation, where the output is instead less complex than the input?
items.zh: 条件GAN在输出高度详细或照片级真实感的问题上似乎很有效，这在图像处理和图形学任务中很常见。但对于视觉问题（如语义分割），输出比输入更简单，情况又如何呢？

items.en: To begin to test this, we train a cGAN (with/without L1 loss) on cityscape photo→→\rightarrowlabels. Figure 10 shows qualitative results, and quantitative classification accuracies are reported in Table 6. Interestingly, cGANs, trained without the L1 loss, are able to solve this problem at a reasonable degree of accuracy. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of GANs successfully generating “labels”, which are nearly discrete, rather than “images”, with their continuous-valued variation222Note that the label maps we train on are not exactly discrete valued, as they are resized from the original maps using bilinear interpolation and saved as jpeg images, with some compression artifacts.. Although cGANs achieve some success, they are far from the best available method for solving this problem: simply using L1 regression gets better scores than using a cGAN, as shown in Table 6. We argue that for vision problems, the goal (i.e. predicting output close to the ground truth) may be less ambiguous than graphics tasks, and reconstruction losses like L1 are mostly sufficient.
items.zh: 为了初步测试这一点，我们在城市景观照片→标签任务上训练了一个cGAN（带/不带L1损失）。图10显示了定性结果，定量分类准确率见表6。有趣的是，没有L1损失训练的cGAN能够以合理的准确率解决这个问题。据我们所知，这是首次证明GAN成功生成“标签”（几乎是离散的）而非“图像”（具有连续值变化）²。尽管cGAN取得了一定成功，但远非解决该问题的最佳方法：如表6所示，仅使用L1回归就能获得比cGAN更好的分数。我们认为，对于视觉问题，目标（即预测接近真实值的输出）可能比图形学任务更不模糊，因此L1等重建损失基本足够。

items.en: Since the initial release of the paper and our pix2pix codebase, the Twitter community, including computer vision and graphics practitioners as well as visual artists, have successfully applied our framework to a variety of novel image-to-image translation tasks, far beyond the scope of the original paper. Figure 11 and Figure 12 show just a few examples from the #pix2pix hashtag, including Background removal, Palette generation, Sketch →→\rightarrow Portrait, Sketch→→\rightarrowPokemon, ”Do as I Do” pose transfer, Learning to see: Gloomy Sunday, as well as the bizarrely popular #edges2cats and #fotogenerator.
items.zh: 自论文和pix2pix代码库首次发布以来，Twitter社区（包括计算机视觉和图形学从业者以及视觉艺术家）已成功将我们的框架应用于各种新颖的图像到图像翻译任务，远远超出了原始论文的范围。图11和图12仅展示了#pix2pix标签下的几个示例，包括背景去除、调色板生成、素描→肖像、素描→宝可梦、“Do as I Do”姿态迁移、Learning to see: Gloomy Sunday，以及异常流行的#edges2cats和#fotogenerator。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Learning to see: Gloomy Sunday: An interactive artistic demo developed by Memo Akten [8] based on our pix2pix codebase. Please click the image to play the video in a browser.
items.capZh: 图12：Learning to see: Gloomy Sunday：由Memo Akten [8]基于我们的pix2pix代码库开发的交互式艺术演示。请点击图片在浏览器中播放视频。

items.en: Note that these applications are creative projects, were not obtained in controlled, scientific conditions, and may rely on some modifications to the pix2pix code we released. Nonetheless, they demonstrate the promise of our approach as a generic commodity tool for image-to-image translation problems.
items.zh: 请注意，这些应用是创意项目，并非在受控的科学条件下获得，并且可能依赖于对我们发布的pix2pix代码的一些修改。尽管如此，它们展示了我们的方法作为图像到图像翻译问题的通用工具的前景。

items.en: The results in this paper suggest that conditional adversarial networks are a promising approach for many image-to-image translation tasks, especially those involving highly structured graphical outputs. These networks learn a loss adapted to the task and data at hand, which makes them applicable in a wide variety of settings.
items.zh: 本文的结果表明，条件对抗网络对于许多图像到图像翻译任务（尤其是那些涉及高度结构化图形输出的任务）是一种有前景的方法。这些网络学习适应任务和数据的损失，使其适用于各种设置。

items.capZh: 图18：边缘→照片模型应用于[19]中人类绘制素描的额外结果。注意，模型是在自动检测边缘上训练的，但能泛化到人类绘制的图像。

items.capEn: Figure 19: Example results on photo inpainting, compared to [43], on the Paris StreetView dataset [14]. This experiment demonstrates that the U-net architecture can be effective even when the predicted pixels are not geometrically aligned with the information in the input – the information used to fill in the central hole has to be found in the periphery of these photos.
items.capZh: 图19：照片修复的示例结果，与[43]在巴黎街景数据集[14]上的对比。该实验表明，即使预测像素与输入信息在几何上不对齐（用于填充中心孔洞的信息必须从这些照片的周边寻找），U-net架构也能有效工作。

items.capZh: 图20：将热成像图像转换为RGB照片的示例结果，数据集来自[27]。

items.capEn: Figure 21: Example failure cases. Each pair of images shows input on the left and output on the right. These examples are selected as some of the worst results on our tasks. Common failures include artifacts in regions where the input image is sparse, and difficulty in handling unusual inputs. Please see https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/ for more comprehensive results.
items.capZh: 图21：示例失败案例。每对图像左侧为输入，右侧为输出。这些示例被选为任务中最差的一些结果。常见失败包括输入图像稀疏区域出现伪影，以及处理异常输入时的困难。请访问https://phillipi.github.io/pix2pix/查看更全面的结果。
